app.title: OpenClaw Desktop
app.subtitle: Beautiful and easy-to-use OpenClaw desktop client

page.searchDesc: Search across all sessions and data
page.workspaceDesc: Browse and manage Agent workspace files

sessions.pageDesc: Manage session entry points, search, and recent conversations.
sessions.newSessionDesc: Pick an Agent and model to start something new.
sessions.searchDesc: Find historical sessions, messages, and related context.

newSessionPage.title: OpenClaw Desktop
newSessionPage.subtitle: Connect OpenClaw Gateway, Workbench, and Knowledge Base so every session becomes traceable work.
newSessionPage.quickStartDesc: Pick a practical starting point and OpenClaw will prepare the first message.
newSessionPage.scenarioReminderPrompt: Help me set up a dedicated timed task. First clarify the goal, trigger time, repeat rule, and reminder style, then give me an executable arrangement.
newSessionPage.scenarioPlanDesc: Turn loose tasks into a clear order.
newSessionPage.scenarioPlanPrompt: Help me plan today's execution order. First confirm the most important goal and constraints, then break the work into 3-5 executable steps. If information is missing, list the questions I should answer.
newSessionPage.scenarioReviewPrompt: Help me review a completed or blocked work item. Organize it by background, actions taken, current conclusion, risks, and next steps. Mark uncertain details as assumptions.
newSessionPage.scenarioKnowledgePrompt: Help me organize the material I provide next into knowledge-base-ready content. First extract key facts, decisions, todos, and open questions, then suggest the right knowledge topic or Workbench document.
newSessionPage.scenarioSchedulePrompt: Help me arrange a schedule. First confirm attendees, topic, duration, time preferences, and prep material, then output a clear meeting plan and pre-work checklist.
newSessionPage.composerDesc: Describe the goal directly, or start from a scenario above or a Workbench item on the side.
newSessionPage.starterApplied: Filled in "{{title}}". You can add more detail before sending.
newSessionPage.workbenchContinuationsDesc: Reads current items, next tasks, and active plans automatically.
newSessionPage.noWorkbenchDesc: No unfinished task was found in Workbench. You can start from a common scenario.
newSessionPage.noWorkbenchBindingDesc: This instance does not have a readable Workbench repository yet. You can start from a common scenario.

workbench.pageDesc: Move work through items, plans, execution, outputs, and reviews.
workbench.kanbanDesc: A Repository-backed board for matters, plans, and completed work.
workbench.activityDesc: Review actions, approvals, and results executed by OpenClaw Agents.
workbench.dashboardDesc: See Workbench projects, tasks, outputs, and execution state at a glance.
workbench.dashboardHeroDesc: A lighter entry for current tasks, project focus, and recent outputs.
workbench.projectsDesc: Show project entities from README files, status, and summaries.
workbench.tasksDesc: Parse concrete task items from task Markdown.
workbench.outputsDesc: Show dialog artifacts, project outputs, and reusable repository assets together.
workbench.reviewsDesc: Review retrospectives, reviews, and acceptance records.
workbench.plansReviewsDesc: Repository plans/ and reviews/ will be connected in a later phase.
workbench.previewEmpty: Select a matter or plan to preview its Markdown
workbench.repositoryRequiredDesc: Repository binding and initialization now live in the Repository tab. After binding, this tab opens directly into matters, plans, and execution.
workbench.emptyFilteredOutputs: No outputs match the selected filters
workbench.tailActionContextDesc: A Dashboard tail action for a matter. Check the source matter before continuing.
workbench.tailActionStatusContextDesc: A Dashboard status tail action. Check the matter status and acceptance criteria first.
workbench.tailActionReviewContextDesc: A Dashboard review tail action. Check the matter run records and output clues first.
workbench.statusTailActionDesc: Choose the new matter status, then confirm to complete the matching status tail action.
workbench.updateMatterStatus: Update Matter Status and Complete Tail Action
workbench.matterStatusUpdated: Matter status updated and tail action completed
workbench.statusTailActionUnavailable: This status tail action cannot be handled now
workbench.reviewTailActionDesc: Check run records, outputs, and knowledge changes, then write the confirmed review into reviews/weekly/.
workbench.reviewDraftMissingSource: Source matter is missing, so a review draft cannot be created
workbench.confirmReviewDraft: Confirm Review and Complete Tail Action
workbench.reviewDraftConfirmed: Review confirmed and tail action completed
workbench.reviewDraftConfirmUnavailable: This review draft cannot be confirmed now

knowledge.pageDesc: Manage sources, Wiki pages, indexes, logs, and references.
knowledge.repositoryRequiredDesc: Repository binding and AI structure mapping now live in the Repository tab. After binding, this tab opens directly into reading and maintenance.
knowledge.repoGateDesc: Knowledge will work from sources/, wiki/, and schemas/ in a Git repository. Repository checks and bootstrap guidance come in the next phase.
knowledge.repoReadyDesc: You can start reading sources/, wiki/index.md, and wiki/log.md.
knowledge.importTextBodyPlaceholder: Paste raw notes, meeting records, ideas, or web excerpts
knowledge.importTextDesc: The import is written to sources/imported/ and enters the undigested queue for a later digest ActionRun.
knowledge.importTextDone: Text source imported and added to the undigested queue.
knowledge.importFileDone: {{count}} text file(s) imported and added to the undigested queue.
knowledge.importFolderDone: {{count}} text file(s) imported from the folder and added to the undigested queue.
knowledge.dropFilesToImportDesc: Markdown / TXT text files enter the undigested queue after import.
knowledge.importUrlPlaceholder: Paste a web URL, e.g. https://example.com/article
knowledge.importUrlNotePlaceholder: Paste an excerpt, key points, or notes (optional)
knowledge.importUrlDesc: Desktop does not fetch the page body yet; it saves the URL and excerpt to sources/imported/ and adds it to the undigested queue.
knowledge.importUrlDone: URL clipped and added to the undigested queue.
knowledge.previewEmpty: Select a source, Wiki page, or search result to read it here
knowledge.gitHistoryEmpty: No commits yet, or this repository has not recorded history for this file.
knowledge.rewriteStarted: Knowledge rewrite action created. Check Action Center for approval and progress.
knowledge.rewriteNotConnected: Gateway is not connected, so auto rewrite cannot start.
knowledge.rewriteNoAgent: No available Agent, so auto rewrite cannot start.
knowledge.rewriteFailed: Failed to start knowledge auto rewrite
knowledge.healthReviewFailed: Failed to write knowledge health review
knowledge.tailActionContextDesc: A Dashboard knowledge tail action. Refresh the index/log or start a knowledge rewrite when ready.

repositoryGate.knowledgeDesc: Knowledge uses sources/, wiki/, and schemas/ in a Git repository so Agents can maintain a growing personal Wiki.
repositoryGate.workbenchDesc: Workbench uses the same Git repository to record matters, plans, runs, outputs, and reviews.
repositoryGate.desktopSetupTitle: Use a repository on this computer
repositoryGate.desktopSetupDesc: Recommended: let Desktop create one automatically, or choose an existing folder. Most users should not need to type a path.
repositoryGate.mappingNotConnected: Gateway is not connected, so AI knowledge mapping cannot start.
repositoryGate.mappingNoAgent: No available Agent, so knowledge mapping cannot start.
repositoryGate.workbenchMappingFailed: Could not map Workbench semantic structure
repositoryGate.mappingUnsafe: The AI returned unsafe path mappings, so they were not saved.
repositoryGate.mappingConfirmDesc: Knowledge will read sources, wiki, index, and log from this mapping after it is saved.
repositoryGate.gatewaySetupTitle: Use a repository on the Gateway machine
repositoryGate.gatewaySetupDesc: For remote Gateways. Paste a Git repository URL for Gateway to clone, or let Gateway create a default repository under the user's home directory.
repositoryGate.gatewayRepoUrlPlaceholder: Paste a Git URL, e.g. https://github.com/me/agentic-repo.git
repositoryGate.gatewayRepoUrlRequired: Paste a Git repository URL first.
repositoryGate.gatewayCapabilityPending: Gateway repository operations are not connected yet. The intent was saved for Gateway/Companion support.
repositoryGate.gatewayPathPlaceholder: Repository path on the Gateway machine, e.g. ~/OpenClaw/Agentic Repository
repositoryGate.localRepositoryUnavailable: Local repository capabilities are unavailable in this environment.
repositoryGate.pathPlaceholder: Enter a repository path, for example /Users/me/agentic-repo
repositoryGate.syncRepositoryRules: Sync Repository Rules to Agent Workspace
repositoryGate.syncRepositoryRulesPartial: Repository rules partially synced: {{updated}} updated, {{failed}} failed.

hint.repo_unbound: Bind an Agentic Repository for the current OpenClaw instance first.
hint.git_missing: Install Git first. Desktop needs Git to inspect and version the repository.
hint.repo_path_missing: Confirm the path exists, or initialize a new desktop-local repository from the template.
hint.repo_not_git: This path is not a Git repository yet. Template initialization runs git init first.
hint.repo_empty: An empty repository can receive the default template directly.
hint.repo_needs_bootstrap: If this is an existing knowledge repository, use AI mapping. If you want a default OpenClaw repository, initialize the template.
hint.repo_remote_unreachable: gateway-local requires Gateway/Companion repository capabilities before Desktop can access it.
hint.repo_permission_denied: Desktop cannot read this path. Check system permissions or choose another location.

collaboration.pageDesc: Manage OpenClaw Agent teams, office space, and multi-Agent collaboration.
collaboration.teamsDesc: View and orchestrate Agents from the Gateway.
collaboration.officeDesc: Observe Agent status and collaboration relationships in a spatial view.
collaboration.relatedRunsDesc: Open the Workbench to review team and office run records.

controlCenter.pageDesc: Manage Agent capabilities, runtime environment, permissions, and instance settings.
controlCenter.tasksDesc: Manage scheduled jobs and automation in OpenClaw Gateway.
controlCenter.extensionsDesc: Manage plugins, skills, MCP, and Companion capabilities.
controlCenter.tuningDesc: Tune Agent identity, memory, models, and context policies.
controlCenter.settingsDesc: Configure instance connections, appearance, and Desktop behavior.
controlCenter.repositoryProtocolDesc: Manage AGENTS.md, schemas/, BOOTSTRAP.md, and path mappings.
controlCenter.runtimeLayerDesc: Manage Gateway, Agent tuning, extensions, scheduled jobs, memory, and instance settings.
controlCenter.repositoryLayerDesc: Manage knowledge, matters, plans, runs, outputs, reviews, and agent-readable protocols.
controlCenter.desktopSelfKnowledgeSyncDone: Desktop manual synced to Gateway Agents
controlCenter.desktopSelfKnowledgeSyncPartial: Desktop manual partially synced. Check the console for details.

wizard.title: Welcome to OpenClaw
wizard.subtitle: Let's set up your workspace
wizard.themeDesc: Select your preferred appearance mode and accent color
wizard.connectionDesc: Configure your connection to an OpenClaw Gateway

connection.electronOnlyDesc: Auto discovery requires running in the Electron desktop app.
connection.noInstancesDesc: OpenClaw is not installed or Gateway is not running.
connection.instanceNamePlaceholder: Name this connection, e.g. Office Server
connection.pleaseFillFields: Please fill in the gateway URL and Token
connection.pleaseFillUrl: Please fill in the gateway URL
connection.interruptedRetrying: Gateway connection interrupted. Retry {{attempt}} starting in ~{{seconds}} seconds.

chat.greeting: Hello! I'm your OpenClaw AI assistant. How can I help you?
chat.selectSession: Select a session to start chatting
chat.newSessionSubtitle: Select Agent and model to start a new conversation
chat.thinkingInfo: Controls how much reasoning the model shows before answering
chat.agentSwitchWait: Please wait for the current response to finish before switching Agent

tool.clickToView: Click a tool call in the chat to view details

insight.sessionSummaryDesc: Can connect to OpenClaw or local summary generation.
insight.keyFactsDesc: Collect important facts and constraints confirmed by users.
insight.todoListDesc: Extract unfinished items and assignees from the session.

workspace.title: Workspaces
workspace.textOnly: Only text files can be viewed
workspace.selectFileHint: Select a file to view content

instance.companionReinstallConfirm: Reinstall the Companion plugin on this Gateway? Restart or reload the Gateway after it finishes.
instance.companionReinstallSuccess: Companion reinstalled. Restart or reload the Gateway, then check again.
instance.companionUninstallConfirm: Uninstall the Companion plugin from this Gateway? Restart or reload the Gateway after it finishes.
instance.companionUninstallSuccess: Companion uninstalled. Restart or reload the Gateway, then check again.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDesc: Select appearance mode and accent color
settings.navigationDesc: Configure how the app sidebar navigation is presented
settings.sidebarNavGroupedDesc: When enabled, primary navigation is grouped by overview, work, and team. When disabled, it stays compact.
settings.defaultHomeViewDesc: Choose whether the app home opens the dashboard or a new session.
settings.connectAllInstancesOnStartupDesc: When disabled, only the current instance connects at startup. Other instances stay connected after first use.
settings.sessionMessageDisplayDesc: Configure how the session detail page displays OpenClaw replies and tool events
settings.sessionToolCallDisplayDesc: Show OpenClaw tool events and historical tool calls in the session detail page.
settings.sessionMessageDisplayOpenClawFact: OpenClaw realtime events include assistant, tool, and lifecycle streams. History may store multiple assistant messages under the same runId. These settings apply to both realtime listening and history loading.
settings.agentSwitchingDesc: Configure what happens when switching Agents in a conversation
settings.subagentSessionLimitation: Child-session mode is subject to OpenClaw sub-agent personality, memory, and tool-policy limits, so it may behave differently from a normal Agent session.
settings.externalLinkModeDesc: Choose to open external links in the system default browser or in an internal window
settings.desktopPetDesc: Show OpenClaw mascot pet on desktop, linked to AI status

extensions.name: Name
extensions.pluginInventoryDegraded: Unable to read the complete plugin inventory; showing the plugin tool fallback
extensions.pluginToolFallback: Showing plugin tools from the Gateway tool catalog, not the complete installed plugin inventory.
extensions.marketplaceSearchPlaceholder: Search skill names, use cases, or keywords...
extensions.marketplaceEmptyDesc: Tencent SkillHub is recommended by default; ClawHub is also available.
extensions.marketplaceNotConnected: Connect to OpenClaw Gateway before installing skills.

artifact.emptyDesc: Artifacts generated in conversations will appear here
artifact.title: Title
artifact.importFileHint: When a local file path is provided, a copy is imported into Artifact storage.
artifact.aiCreatePlaceholder: Describe the artifact you want to create...
artifact.aiCreateFailed: AI failed to generate valid artifact structure, please try a more specific description

companion.title: Companion
companion.notInstalled: OpenClaw Desktop Companion is not installed or not enabled. The desktop app requires the Companion plugin on your Gateway for authentication and file sync. Please install and enable it, then reconnect from the Instance list.
companion.statusAbnormal: OpenClaw Desktop Companion status is abnormal. Please open a session and ask the AI to install it.
companion.upgradeExplanation: OpenClaw Desktop Companion needs to upgrade the current Desktop device to a registered node. Granting authorization allows it to verify connections, manage local files, and serve as a trusted endpoint.
companion.noPendingRequest: No pending Desktop Companion authorization request

tasks.deleteConfirmContent: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
tasks.name: Name
tasks.contentPlaceholder: e.g. Send morning summary in team channel at 9am every day...
tasks.contentDesc: Instructions sent to Agent when triggered
tasks.cronHint: Format: Min Hour Day Month Week. Example: "0 */6 * * *" (every 6 hours), "30 9 * * 1-5" (weekdays 9:30)
tasks.emptyDesc: Click "Add Task" to create your first scheduled task

actions.title: AI Action Center
actions.subtitle: Natural-language actions, plan approvals & OpenClaw execution session mapping
actions.emptyDesc: Start with natural-language orchestration from the Teams page to see ActionRuns here.
actions.clearDesc: Only clears Desktop local ActionRun index, will not delete OpenClaw Gateway sessions or files.
actions.notConnected: Not connected to Gateway, cannot submit approval decision
actions.notConnectedResync: Not connected to Gateway, cannot resync
actions.notConnectedResume: Not connected to Gateway, cannot resume with follow-up
actions.resumed: Follow-up message sent, Gateway will continue execution

office.title: OpenClaw 3D Office
office.clickHint: Click robots in the scene to switch focus.
office.behaviorDesc1: Lounge → Work/Meeting: Walk quickly to destination
office.behaviorDesc3: Multiple active Agent sessions: Enter meeting area for collaboration
office.behaviorDesc4: Unselected: WASD/left-click drag to pan · Select Agent: WASD to walk & switch to first-person view · V to return to third-person
office.behaviorDesc5: Click front desk: Learn about current office status
office.receptionTemplate: Front Desk: {{greeting}}. Currently {{status}}, {{agentCount}} Agents in the office, {{sessionCount}} active/idle sessions. Work area {{workCount}}, Meeting area {{meetingCount}}, Lounge {{loungeCount}}.

tuning.title: Tuning
tuning.pageDesc: Manage Agent persona, memory, communication channels, model integration & Gateway configuration
tuning.memoryOverviewDesc: Automatically generated by Agent daily, recording important information from conversations
tuning.notConnectedMemory: Not connected to Gateway, cannot read memory
tuning.noMemoryDesc: No memory files yet, Agent will automatically generate memory during conversations
tuning.invalidValue: Please enter a valid value (at least 1000 characters)
tuning.channelsDesc: Manage connected messaging platforms for OpenClaw
tuning.modelsTitleDesc: Manage AI model integration and default configuration
tuning.noModelsDesc: No connected models yet, click "Add Model" to add
tuning.generalTitleDesc: Gateway network binding, authentication, SSL and other basic settings
tuning.bindRestartWarning: Gateway restart required after changing binding mode
tuning.openTuningOnStartupDesc: Default to Tuning page after launch

teams.title: Agents
teams.empty: No Agents read from Gateway yet
teams.composeTitle: Compose Agent Team with Natural Language
teams.composeDesc: Will create an ActionRun and submit to Gateway for execution. You can track the result in the Action Center.
teams.composePlaceholder: e.g. Create a product Agent to manage feature requests and backlog...
teams.createAgentDesc: Desktop will save these details as a local extension profile. After creation, you can sync to Gateway.
teams.personalityPlaceholder: Personality: Communication style, preferences and boundaries of this Agent
teams.cognitionPlaceholder: Cognition: Principles, methodology and judgment criteria
teams.memoryPlaceholder: Memory Summary: Long-term responsibilities, important preferences, known context
teams.composeFirst: Write a description of how you want to orchestrate the team first
teams.noInstance: Missing current instance, cannot record ActionRun
teams.notConnectedGatewayCompose: Not connected to Gateway, cannot execute team orchestration
teams.notConnectedGatewayCreate: Not connected to Gateway, cannot create Agent
teams.submittedCreateAgent: Submitted to Gateway to create Agent
teams.localDraftNoFiles: Local draft Agent not yet connected to Gateway, no remote files

agentFiles.title: Agent Files
agentFiles.selectFileHint: Select a file to view content
agentFiles.textOnly: Only text files can be viewed
agentFiles.listFailed: Failed to read Agent file list
agentFiles.discardDesc: Switching to {{name}} will lose unsaved changes to the current file.
agentFiles.refreshDiscardDesc: Refreshing the file list will re-read the current file content.

dashboard.noSessions: No sessions yet — start a new conversation
dashboard.pageDesc: Start with what can continue today, what needs approval, and what was preserved.
dashboard.workSystemDesc: Today, approvals, stuck work, recent outputs, weekly outputs, and knowledge movement in the first view.
dashboard.tailActionAlreadyResolved: This tail action was already handled or changed
dashboard.tailActionCompleteFailed: Failed to update the tail action
dashboard.tailActionCompleteUnavailable: This tail action cannot be updated now
dashboard.onboardingDesc: Gateway is ready. Next, put sources, knowledge, matters, plans, execution records, outputs, and reviews into a local work repository.
dashboard.onboardingGatewayDoneDesc: AI capability is connected to Desktop.
dashboard.onboardingRepositoryNextDesc: Give knowledge, matters, plans, execution records, and outputs a portable long-term home.
dashboard.onboardingFirstThingNextDesc: Start from a real goal so AI can help move it, track it, and preserve the result.
dashboard.onboardingRepositoryReadyDesc: You can now start from the first thing and let work settle into the repository.
dashboard.firstMatterPlaceholder: Enter the first thing, e.g. organize household bills into a monthly plan
dashboard.firstMatterCreated: First thing was written to the work repository
dashboard.firstMatterCreateFailed: Failed to create the first thing
dashboard.gatewayStatusDesc: Connection, health, runtime version, and session count.
dashboard.gatewayUsageDesc: Summarized from available Gateway data without inventing token or cost metrics.
dashboard.recentWorkKnowledgeDesc: Conversations, Agentic Repository work, and knowledge notes in one workspace.
dashboard.outputsArtifactsDesc: Recent reports, dashboards, files, apps, and action runs.
dashboard.attentionDesc: Suggested next moves from the current state.
dashboard.usageUnavailable: Gateway token/cost usage is not available yet
dashboard.realUsageUnavailable: Gateway did not return real usage yet
dashboard.costAvailabilityNote: Shown only when Gateway has usage metadata and local pricing
dashboard.gatewayReady: Gateway is connected and ready for new collaboration.
dashboard.gatewayLimited: Gateway is disconnected, so live capabilities are limited while local data remains visible.
dashboard.attentionGateway: Connect Gateway before starting new sessions or refreshing live status.
dashboard.attentionRepository: Bind or initialize Repository so work and knowledge flow into the dashboard.
dashboard.attentionAgents: No available Agents yet. Configure a default team member first.
dashboard.attentionArtifacts: No artifacts yet. Start from a session or workflow and preserve the output.
dashboard.attentionClear: Core status looks good. You can start the next conversation now.

search.enterKeyword: Enter keywords to search local sessions
